use_cases: Selecting numeric values in configuration settings or forms
Filtering products or data by numeric ranges like price or quantity
Adjusting intensity controls like volume, brightness, or opacity
Setting numeric thresholds in dashboards or analytics tools
Capturing user preferences in onboarding flows
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist range slider component with custom-styled webkit and moz thumb elements featuring subtle shadows and smooth hover transitions. Light-themed with a gray rounded track and white thumb, designed for numeric value selection in forms, settings panels, and data filtering interfaces.
